utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So you did see me that day . Because it seemed like you did not .

emotion_cause.span: 1_you did see me that day . Because it seemed like you did not .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is okay . Come , come on in .

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: Thanks for letting me stay here ! I mean Monica place was nice , but her fiancée sure stares a lot .

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: Oh my God ! You do a great Chandler !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Uh ... huh . Yeah , I ... I have a knack for impressions .

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: Well , maybe after we get reacquainted uh , you can do me .
